news.title: Sandy Springs Police release video of arrest as suspect car slammed onto windshield of officer's cruiser
news.summary: Sandy Springs PD said on Facebook the incident occurred with a suspect wanted on drug charges and "ties to a larger criminal organization."

news.title: Woman arrested for wrong-way driving on I-85 in Gwinnett County
news.summary: A 27-year-old woman faces multiple charges after driving the wrong way on Interstate 85 and striking a police vehicle on July 4, according to the Gwinnett County Police Department.

news.title: Tactical team arrests man with hammer in Douglas County
news.summary: A domestic dispute call led to a tactical deployment in Douglas County on Monday after a man armed with a hammer barricaded himself inside a basement.

news.title: Former officer sentenced in hit-and-run that killed 27-year-old on I-75/85
news.summary: The victim family’s emotional plea for the judge to give the former officer a maximum sentence, on Channel 2 Action News starting at 4:00 p.m.

news.title: Man sets house on fire, attacks metro Atlanta family with garden shears, deputies say
news.summary: A Gainesville man faces charges of arson and aggravated assault after attacking a family in Hall County and setting their house on fire.

news.title: Suspect lands car on Sandy Springs patrol cruiser during chase
news.summary: A federal drug suspect tied to a large criminal organization was arrested Friday after his vehicle launched onto a Sandy Springs police cruiser during a chase last week, authorities said.

news.title: Pedestrian hospitalized after being struck on Riverside Parkway
news.summary: A pedestrian suffered serious injuries Saturday evening after being struck by a car while crossing a roadway, Cobb County police said.

news.title: Traffic stop leads to felony fraud arrests in Fayette County
news.summary: A routine traffic stop for driving in the wrong lane led Fayette County sheriff's deputies to uncover a fraud ring and illegal narcotics.

news.title: Jonesboro burglary standoff: 3 suspects arrested after SWAT response
news.summary: Three people face felony charges following a residential burglary that sparked a massive SWAT response and street closures in Jonesboro.

news.title: DeKalb County Jail inmate death: 73-year-old man dies in custody
news.summary: An investigation is underway after jail officials found a 73-year-old man unresponsive inside his housing unit at the DeKalb County Jail.
